name: logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 10-20 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 10-20 shipments/month, inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide a fleet management system instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
target_audience: logistics managers in freight brokerage firms processing 10-20 shipments/month
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance leads to unexpected breakdowns.
